videos.title: HTML Classes and IDs Explained
videos.description: Quick explanation of HTML classes and IDs, when to use each, and how they work with CSS.

videos.title: CSS Class Selectors and the Class Attribute
videos.description: Kevin Powell covers CSS class selectors and best practices for naming and organizing classes.

videos.title: BEM Naming Convention Explained
videos.description: Brad Traversy explains BEM naming convention for maintainable CSS class names.

videos.title: JavaScript classList API Tutorial
videos.description: Comprehensive tutorial on using the classList API to add, remove, toggle, and check CSS classes.
